# AgentGate
> Monetize any API in 3 lines of code with x402 payments

AgentGate lets developers add pay-per-call USDC payments to any API using the x402 protocol.

## Docs
- [Introduction](/getting-started/introduction)
- [Quickstart for Sellers](/getting-started/sellers)
- [Quickstart for Buyers](/getting-started/buyers)
- [API Reference](/api/endpoints)

## API
- Discovery: GET https://api.agentgate.online/v1/discover
- Categories: GET https://api.agentgate.online/v1/discover/categories
- Fulfillment: POST https://fulfill.agentgate.online/v1/{endpoint}
